slide-0.text: the table of contents page should be cooler looking. and chunked into fewer categories. it can have many pages, but their should be logical sectioning

slide-3.text: This should be geared toward a non physicist, and focus on how the structure performed. Highlighting what was passed and how the information flowed.

slide-4.text: Also should be more about the conclusion and less about raw data
Like what we learned through this.

slide-5.text: Once again this should be more about the conclusion then just all the information. geared toward non-physist

slide-7.text: The color pallette should change more page to page and the titles of the page (like conclusion here) more prominent.
